name: Loops
concept: Loops — make the computer repeat things so YOU don't have to

learn: Computers are AMAZING at repeating things — they never get bored
A loop runs the blocks inside it again and again — you choose how many times
Instead of ⬆️⬆️⬆️⬆️⬆️⬆️ you can say: repeat 6 times [⬆️] — shorter and smarter!
In real JavaScript this is called a for loop — tap the </> button in any level to see YOUR blocks as real code

blocks.name: repeat __ times
blocks.text: runs everything tucked inside it, over and over. Tap the number to change how many times!

blocks.name: your World 1 blocks
blocks.text: still here — now you can put them INSIDE a repeat

intro.goal: Solve with as FEW blocks as you can. Loops are the secret to 3 stars ⭐⭐⭐

recap: Loops repeat blocks so you don't copy-paste them — shorter programs, same result
You put a loop inside another loop — that's nested loops, a real pro move
You spotted repeating patterns (walk-walk-grab, step-turn-step) and turned them into loops
The </> panel showed your blocks as real JavaScript: for (var i = 0; i < 6; i++)

choices: 🥇 in the order you put them
quiz.why: That's sequencing from World 1 — top to bottom, always.

quiz.q: The robot faces ➡️ and runs ⬆️⬆️⬆️. How many squares does it walk?
quiz.why: Three move blocks = three squares. The robot does exactly what you say.
And the robot must be STANDING on the gem when it collects!

quiz.q: 🔁 repeat 4 times [⬆️] — how many squares does the robot walk?
quiz.why: The loop runs the move block 4 times.
Six moves = repeat the move 6 times. Two blocks instead of six!

quiz.q: 🔁 repeat 3 times [⬆️💎] — how many gems does the robot try to collect?
quiz.why: Everything inside the loop runs 3 times: walk, grab, walk, grab, walk, grab.

quiz.q: This program repeats a pattern: ⬆️⬆️💎 ⬆️⬆️💎 ⬆️⬆️💎. Which loop matches it?
quiz.why: The repeating chunk is ⬆️⬆️💎, and it happens 3 times.

levels.name: Loop-de-Loop
levels.hint: NEW BLOCK! 🔁 repeat runs whatever you tuck inside it. Try: repeat 6 [⬆️], then 💎

levels.name: Gem Rhythm
levels.hint: The pattern is: walk walk walk, grab. It happens twice — put the WHOLE pattern inside one repeat!

levels.name: The Square Dance
levels.hint: Every side is the same dance: walk 3, grab, turn right. Repeat it 3 times!

levels.name: The Staircase
levels.hint: Each stair is: forward, turn left, up, turn right. How many stairs?

levels.name: Gem Beat
levels.hint: Feel the beat: move move grab, move move grab, move move grab 🎵

levels.name: Loop Inside a Loop
levels.hint: Pro move: put a repeat INSIDE a repeat 🤯 Each side = repeat 5 [⬆️], then grab and turn.

levels.name: Gem Stairs
levels.hint: Like the staircase — but now grab a gem on every step!

levels.name: Around the Block
levels.hint: Each side: 2 steps, grab the gem, 2 more steps, turn. Four sides!

levels.name: Lefty Loop
levels.hint: Same square, other direction! You start facing DOWN — use turn LEFT this time.

levels.name: Boss: Loop Master
levels.hint: Boss! Climb the gem stairs with a loop, then turn and loop down the hallway to the flag 🏁
